metadata.title: Synaply - Koyi Kalmomi tare da AI & Maimaitawa Mai Tsari
metadata.description: Haɓaka ƙwarewar yarenku tare da maimaitawa mai tsari mai amfani da AI. Ƙirƙiri jerin kalmominku ko koyi daga jerin sunayen jama'a.
metadata.keywords: koyi turanci, maimaitawa mai tsari, gina kalmomi, flashcards, AI koyon yare, jerin kalmomi, manhajar koyon yare, koyi sifen, koyi faransanci, koyi jamusanci, ƙwarewar yare, haddace kalmomi, SRS koyo
metadata.og_description: Haɓaka ƙwarewar yarenku tare da maimaitawa mai tsari mai amfani da AI. Koyi cikin sauri, tunawa na lokaci mai tsawo.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Manhajar Koyon Yare Interface
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Koyi Sabbin Kalmomi Cikin Sauƙi
metadata.twitter_description: Kasance tare da Synaply don faɗaɗa kalmominku ta amfani da maimaitawa mai tsari da AI.

common.title: Take
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Koyon {target} daga {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Bincika jerin kalmomi na jama'a da playlists daga sauran masu amfani.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Inganta kalmominku ta hanyar fassara jimlolin da AI ya samar dangane da kowane fanni ko jerin kalmominku.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Duba, bincika, gyara ko share kalmomi daga tarinku.
dashboard.import_success: An shigo da kalmomi cikin nasara!
dashboard.import_error_retry: Ba mu iya ajiye sabuwar kalmarku ba. Bari mu sake gwadawa sau ɗaya!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: An kasa samar da jerin kalmomi.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Da fatan za a zaɓi fanni ko shigar da naku mahallin.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI zai taimaka tare da ma'ana da misalin jimla
dashboard.auto_translate: Fassara atomatik filin da babu komai
dashboard.delete_confirm: Kun tabbata kuna son share wannan kalma?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Kun tabbata kuna son share DUKKAN kalmomin ku? Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba.
dashboard.no_words_found: Babu kalmomin da aka samu. Gwada wata kalmar bincike daban ko ƙara wasu kalmomi!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Babu kalmomin da aka samu don karatu. Da fatan za a fara ƙara sabbin kalmomi a jerin ku!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Ba ku da kalmomin da za ku duba a yau. Koma baya an jima ko ƙara sabbin kalmomi!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Kyakkyawan aiki! Kun duba kalmominku na yau.
dashboard.correct_answer_is: Amsar da take daidai ita ce: {answer}
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Shigar da fanni don samar da jimlolin aiwatarwa na musamman gare ku!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Barin shi babu komai zai samar da jimloli dangane da kalmomin ku.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Taimaka mana ingantawa! Raba ra'ayoyinku, bayar da rahoton kurakurai, ko neman fasali:
dashboard.support_desc: If you like this app, you can support its development.

onboarding.journey_begins: Tafiyarku ta ƙwarewar yare tana farawa a nan.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Don samun mafi kyau daga Synaply, muna ba da shawarar wannan hanya mai sauƙi:
onboarding.step1_title: Mayar da Hankali kan Wani Fanni
onboarding.step1_desc: Ƙara kusan kalmomi 100 masu alaƙa da fanni guda (misali, Kasuwanci ko Tafiya) don gina mahalli mai ƙarfi.
onboarding.step2_desc: Ƙware waɗannan kalmomi ta maimaitawa ta kullum har sai sun zama ɓangare na kalmomin ku.
onboarding.step3_desc: Sauya zuwa Aiwatarwa da AI don amfani da sabbin kalmomin ku a cikin cikakkun jimloli da yanayi na zahiri.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Samar da Jerin Kalmomi tare da AI
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: e.g. Words for a business meeting about marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Share this collection of {count} words with other users. It will be visible in the Public Lists gallery.
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Word "{word}" is already in the list
dashboard.inline_add_error: Please provide both original word and translation
dashboard.save_batch_success: Successfully saved {count} words to your list!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Failed to save words. Please try again.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Please remove duplicate words before saving.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Please remove duplicate words before publishing.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI yana hutun shan kofi na ɗan lokaci. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa nan da lokaci kaɗan!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Oops! Ba mu iya samun fahimtar AI ba. Bari mu sake gwadawa!

public_lists.title: Jerin Kalmomi na Jama'a
public_lists.subtitle: Bincika jerin kalmomin da sauran masu amfani suka ƙirƙira don yarukan ku.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Bincika jerin sunaye ta take ko bayani...
public_lists.loading: Ana loda jerin sunaye masu ban mamaki...
public_lists.no_lists_found: Babu jerin sunayen da aka samu
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Gwada bincike daban ko canza tace yaren ku.
public_lists.show_all_langs: Nuna jerin sunaye na dukkan yaraƙun
public_lists.load_error: Ba mu iya loda jerin sunayen jama'a ba a yanzu.

playlists_detail.title: Cikakken Bayanin Playlist
playlists_detail.collections_in_playlist: Tarin kalmomi a cikin wannan playlist

detail.title: Cikakken Bayanin Jerin
detail.added_success: An yi nasarar ƙara kalmomi a tarin ku!
detail.added_error: An kasa ƙara kalmomi a tarin ku.
detail.delete_confirm: Kun tabbata kuna son share wannan jerin jama'a? Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba.
detail.duplicate_error: Akwai kalmomin da suka maimaita kansu a jerin. Da fatan za a cire su kafin ajiyewa.

profile.terms_welcome: Barka da zuwa Synaply. Ta amfani da sabis ɗinmu, kun yarda da waɗannan sharuddan...
profile.title: Saitunan Profile
profile.leave_empty: Bar shi babu komai don kiyaye password ta yanzu
profile.subtitle: Sarrafa bayanan kanku da saitunan yare
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

register.title: Ƙirƙiri account ɗinku
register.password_hint: Dole ne ya kasance aƙalla haruffa 8

best_practice.title: Mafi Kyawun Aiki don Nasara
best_practice.strategy_desc: Don mafi kyawun ƙwarewar koyo, muna ba da shawarar wannan dabarar mataki-3 mai sauƙi:
best_practice.step1_desc: Ƙara kusan kalmomi 100 tare da mayar da hankali kan fanni guda (misali, Tafiya ko Kasuwanci) don ƙirƙirar mahalli.
best_practice.step2_desc: Ƙware waɗannan kalmomi ta maimaitawa ta kullum har sai sun zama ɓangare na kalmomin ku.
best_practice.step3_desc: Sauya zuwa Aiwatarwa da AI don amfani da sabbin kalmomin ku a cikin cikakkun jimloli da yanayin duniya na zahiri.

getting_started.title: Fara Koyon
getting_started.desc: Synaply kayan aiki ne mai ƙarfi da aka tsara don taimaka muku faɗaɗa kalmomin ku da inganta ƙwarewar yarenku ta amfani da maimaitawa mai tsari da basirar wucin gadi (AI).
getting_started.step1_desc: Ƙara kalmomi da kanku ko amfani da AI don samar da jerin sunaye ta fannoni da matakai.
getting_started.step2_desc: Yi amfani da Bitat Kalmomi don haddace kalmomi ta amfani da algorithm na FSRS.

manual.title: Shigarwa da Kai
manual.desc: Shigar da kalmar a yaren da kuke koyo da fassarar sa. Kuna iya ƙara sharhi ko mahalli don haddacewa mafi kyau.

auto_translate.title: Fassara Atomatik
auto_translate.desc: Yi amfani da fasalin "Fassara Atomatik" don fassarar take ta hanyar sabis ɗin DeepL.

ai_list.title: Samar da Jerin Sunaye (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Zaɓi mataki (A1-C2) da fanni, kuma AI (Gemini) zai tattara jerin kalmomi masu dacewa gare ku, waɗanda za a iya ƙarawa a cikin ƙamus ɗin ku da dannawa ɗaya.

ai_insights.title: Fahimtar AI
ai_insights.desc: Ga kowace kalma, AI na iya ba da ma'anoni iri ɗaya, misalan amfani, da shawarwarin nahawu.

spaced_repetition.title: Maimaitawa Mai Tsari
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply yana amfani da algorithm na FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) don lissafin lokacin da ya dace don maimaita kowace kalma.
spaced_repetition.step1: Ana nuna muku kalma a yaren asali.
spaced_repetition.step2: Shigar da fassarar sannan ku danna Enter ko Duba Amsa.
spaced_repetition.step3: Idan ba ku tuna ba — danna "Ban tuna ba" don ganin amsar.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algorithm ɗin zai sake lissafin kwanan wata bita na gaba dangane da amsar ku.

ai_practice.title: Aiwatarwa da AI: Fassara Jimla
ai_practice.desc: Wannan fasalin yana taimakawa wajen horar da nahawu da mahalli ta hanyar fassara cikakkun jimloli da AI ya tsara musamman gare ku.
ai_practice.step1: Zaɓi fanni (misali, "Kasuwanci", "Tafiya") ko barin filin babu komai.
ai_practice.step2: AI zai samar da jimloli 5 akan fannin da aka zaɓa.
ai_practice.step3: Sanya fassarar ku sannan ku karɓi cikakken bayani.
ai_practice.step4: AI zai nuna kurakurai kuma ya ba da shawarar mafi kyawun fassara tare da bayani.

dictionary_management.title: Sarrafa Ƙamus
dictionary_management.search: Bincika: Yi amfani da gurbin bincike don samun kalmomi cikin sauri a tarin ku.
dictionary_management.sorting: Saitawa: Duba jerin duk kalmomin ku tare da zaɓi don share su.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Share duk kalmomi: Ikon goge ƙamus ɗin ku gaba ɗaya tare da dannawa ɗaya.

progress.title: Ci gaba da Maki
progress.desc: Makinku (a saman manhajar) yana nuna adadin kalmomin da kuka fassara daidai. Idan maki ya yi yawa, hakan na nufin kun ƙware kalmomi da yawa!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
